description: Section 05 — projects. 3-column responsive grid of project cards. Each card has a generated thumbnail (diagonal pattern by default, mosaic grid for size 'grid'), a title, a blurb, and chip tags. Big-size cards span all 3 columns and use a 16:10 thumb. Grid-size cards render up to 12 images in a mosaic; missing slots fall back to coloured placeholders so the layout stays balanced even when partially populated.

fields.description: small = 1/3 col, big = full row + 16:10 thumb, grid = mosaic-tile thumb.
fields.name: size
fields.title: Card size

fields.description: Optional. Replaces the synthetic two-word preview on small / big cards. Ignored when card size = grid (use Grid mosaic images instead).
fields.name: image
fields.title: Card thumbnail

fields.description: Only used when card size = grid. Add up to 12 images; the grid renders 4 × 3 tiles. Fewer than 12 is fine — empty slots fall back to plain coloured placeholders.
fields.name: grid_images
fields.title: Grid mosaic images

name: CV Projects
